document.title: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Lavergne-Springer Project in North America dated May 2012.pdf
document.description: This is a technical report and resource estimate prepared for the Lavergne-Springer REE Project in Ontario, Canada, detailing geological findings, exploration activities, resource estimates, and recommendations for further drilling and metallurgical testing.
